articles.author: Pete Hammond
articles.title: The Jury Has Spoken, American Films Shut Out, But What Does It All Mean For Oscars? – Cannes Film Festival - Deadline
articles.description: The Cannes film Festival named Fjord winner of the Palme d'Or but what does this all mean for Oscars? Will Cannes have the impact of the last few years?
articles.content: With the exception of a shared Best Director win (with La Bola Negra) for Fatherland, as well as a Best Actress win for the two stars of All Of A Sudden, the jury of the 79th Cannes Film Festival dec… [+8301 chars]
